title: Upcoming Webinar: Impact of Immigration Enforcement on Employees - Foster Global
content:
## Upcoming Webinar: Impact of Immigration Enforcement on Employees
by Foster , on Webinar
- Date: Thursday, April 30th
- Time: 1:00 pm – 2:00 pm CST
- Speakers: Partner, José Pérez Jr .  and Attorney, Melissa Cantu
This webinar explores immigration enforcement strategies and policies from the employee’s perspective and what employers can do to support their employees.
📖 Learning objectives:
- Examine Executive Orders and policies on immigration enforcement priorities and the consequences.
- Evaluate the legal and practical effects of Travel Bans.
- Discuss what employers can do to support their employees regarding immigration.
